name: Quickie Pasta Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Cook pasta on stove until al dente, then drain.
3. Heat oil in a saucepan.
4. Add onion and sauté until soft (about 5 minutes).
5. Add tomatoes, oregano, salt, and pepper; cook until heated through, about 5 minutes.
6. Combine cooked pasta, sauce, and half the grated cheese in an ovenproof dish.
7. Sprinkle remaining cheese on top.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes at 350°F. For an even quicker version, omit onions and garlic as suggested by The Toronto Sun.
